title: Fast Sling Puck Game, Portable Table Hockey Board Games for Kids and Adults, Tabletop Slingshot Games Toys, Funny Wooden Sling Puck Winner Board Game, Parent-child Interactive Toy Party Game
features: 【Parent-Child Interactive Games】 This fast sling puck game toy is perfect for holiday and birthday parties, game nights and family gatherings. Foosball board game, ideal for family, social activities with your kids and family! Bring endless fun to children, play together, it will become a sweet memory of children's childhood.

【Fun Fast Paced Game Experience】Start the board games and place ten pucks on each side of the board. Hold your finger on the chess piece, pull it back by the rubber band, release your finger, and pop it forward. Sling all of the pucks to the opposite side and get the win! This fast slingshot hockey game requires intelligence and dexterity, and you will obsess with it.

【Exercise kids capacity】This funny ice hockey board game toy can exercise children's hand-eye coordination and concentration ability, improve the flexibility of fingers in the process of using your hand and brain, and enhance children's sense of competition. Stay away from mobile phones and TV screens, and let children participate in a strategic game of table hockey, which is conducive to the healthy development of children.

【Eco-friendly Material】The fast push game board is made of eco-friendly wooden, non-toxic, non-deformable. They are carefully carved with smooth surface and long-time use. Lightweight and compact enough to carry. You can ready to play either on the table or on the floor,with your friends and family, it will bring a lot of laughter and joy from the minute you start playing.

【Best Gifts】Fast sling puck game is a great gift for kids, suitable for kindergarten and families. It’s a perfect choice for Christmas gift, Thanksgiving Day gift, Birthday gift, Children's Day gift, or other special days for kids and teens, surprise your kids or friends with lots of smiles and joy.
